title: CM22 7QL, Thames Water Utilities Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/CP3501MG/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Thames Water Utilities Limited Installation name: Bishop’s Stortford Sludge Treatment Centre Permit number: EPR/CP3501MG/A001  "
